title: Gradient Descent Architecture
description: Gradient Descent is a method that finds the minimum value of a function by moving in the direction of the negative gradient (slope).

gradient_descent.definition: Gradient Descent is a method that finds the minimum value of a function by moving in the direction of the negative gradient (slope).
working_principle: Start with initial values of parameters
gradient_descent.summary: Gradient Descent is an iterative method to reduce error by updating parameters in the direction of the steepest decrease.

weighted_sum.description: In most machine learning models, output is calculated using a weighted sum of inputs.
